name: arcadian-archipelago
description: The Arcadian Archipelago - Pathfinder 2e Campaign Public Wiki

scripts.dev: npm run sync-quartz-config && cd .quartz && npx quartz build --serve --port 8080 --directory ../content --output ../public
scripts.build: npm run sync-quartz-config && cd .quartz && npx quartz build --directory ../content --output ../public
scripts.preview: npm run sync-quartz-config && cd .quartz && npx quartz build --serve --directory ../content --output ../public
